description: End-to-end run of the research_pipeline meta-skill: Planner → Research → Evaluator (with iteration if needed). Loose expected_substrings since the pipeline is the contract; finishing without error is what matters here. Should produce at least plan.md, sprint-contract.json, final-research.md, and eval-report.json.

messages.content: 给我中国半导体设备板块的行业研究框架。涵盖：市场规模与增长、主要玩家与份额、估值水平、关键风险与催化剂。
